messages.crypto_pay_invoice: Your Crypto Pay invoice is ready! Click the button below to pay.
messages.tribute_payment_info: To pay with Tribute (Cards, etc.), please subscribe and join our private channel using the button below. Once joined, your bot access will be activated automatically.
messages.admin_price_selector_title: Select a parameter to change in group {group}:
messages.welcome_back: 🏔️ Welcome back, {name}! Ready to grow taller today?
messages.select_language: 🏔️ Please select a language / Выберите язык:
messages.start_onboarding: ⛰️ Hi {name}! Let's start your journey to the peak of growth. Answer the questions:
messages.onboarding_finished: Great! I've collected all the data. Your journey has begun!
messages.onboarding_analysis_hint: Click the "📊 Get Analysis" button below — preparing your report will take about 30 seconds, after which you will see the result! ⏳
messages.onboarding_cancelled: Survey cancelled. Send /start to begin again.
messages.need_onboarding: You need to complete the survey first! Send /start.
messages.need_payment:
The training program is only available in the full version. 🔒
Use /buy to get access.
messages.already_trained_today: 💪 You have already trained today! Rest is as important for growth as the exercises themselves. Come back tomorrow!
messages.payment_success: Payment successful! Your path to growth is now fully open!
messages.global_error: Sorry, an internal error occurred. We are working on it! 🛠
messages.analysis_analyzing: 🏔️ Climbing the peak of analysis... This may take about 30 seconds. ⏳
messages.analysis_error: Sorry, an error occurred during analysis. Please try again later.
messages.analysis_partial_hint: 🔒 The rest is available in the full version
messages.analysis_upsell_title: 💳 Get full access to analysis and a personal training program for just {price}₽!
messages.health_water_ask: 💧 Water Log How many milliliters did you drink? (e.g., 500)
messages.health_sleep_ask: 😴 Sleep Log How many hours did you sleep today? (e.g., 8)
messages.health_weight_ask: ⚖️ Weight Log Enter your current weight in kg (e.g., 72.5)
messages.health_weight_done: ⛰️ Done! Your weight has been updated. Current BMI: {bmi}.
messages.health_invalid_hours: ⛰️ Please enter a valid number of hours (0-24).
messages.analysis_pre_upsell: To get full access to the analysis and personal training program, please choose a suitable plan below:
messages.tariffs_footer: 💳 Select a term below to unlock full access:
messages.payment_choice_title: 🏔️ You selected: {title} 💳 Choose a payment method: Price is calculated dynamically in the provider's currency.
messages.manual_payment_info_30: 🏔️ Manual Payment Instructions (1 month): 1. Pay the selected tariff using the details below: Russia🇷🇺 - 649₽ Direct card transfer: 2200701709904079 (T-bank) Belarus🇧🇾 - 24.5BYN Direct card transfer: 5548320018279638 (MTBank) Other countries🌍 Cryptocurrency💰 Transfer to USDT TRC20 wallet address - 8.5$: TS7mmCmVFXs3MVEDRevjg4suju76uckGVi. 2. Send the payment screenshot to our manager: {manager} 3. The manager will verify the payment and grant you full access! Usually it takes no more than an hour.

messages.manual_payment_info_180: 🏔️ Manual Payment Instructions (6 months): 1. messages.training_finished: ✅ Peak reached! 🔥 Your streak: {streak} days 💪 Total exercises: {total}
messages.profile_stats: 👤 Your Profile: 🏔️ Current height: {currentHeight} cm ⚖️ Current weight: {weight} kg (BMI: {bmi}) 🔥 Current streak: {streak} days 🏆 Max streak: {maxStreak} days 💪 Total exercises: {totalExercises} 🏋️ Sessions completed: {sessionsCount} 📅 Program day: {programDay}/182 💧 Water today: {water} / 2000 ml 😴 Sleep today: {sleep} / 8 h ❄️ Freezes available: {freezeCount} (Freeze protects your streak if you miss a day. Earned every 7 days!)
messages.export_caption: Your personal data and analysis results.

validation.invalid_age: Please enter a valid age (5 to 100).
validation.invalid_height: Please enter a valid height in cm (50 to 250).
validation.invalid_weight: Please enter a valid weight in kg (10 to 300).
validation.invalid_shoe_size: Please enter a valid shoe size (10 to 60).

admin.no_access: You do not have access to this command.
admin.broadcast_prompt: 📢 Send the broadcast content in a single message: text, photo, video, video note, document (e.g. PDF), voice or sticker. Nothing needs to be uploaded in advance — just send it here. To cancel: /cancel
admin.broadcast_unsupported: Could not recognize this message type. Send text, a photo, video, video note, document, voice or sticker.
admin.broadcast_followup_prompt: 📎 File received. Send a text message to be delivered right after the file (up to 4096 chars, without the 1024-char caption limit). Or tap "Send file only".
admin.broadcast_followup_need_text: Please send a text message to accompany the file, or tap "Send file only" / "Cancel".
admin.broadcast_confirm: ⬆️ This is how the broadcast will look. Send it to {count} users?
admin.broadcast_start: Starting mass broadcast via the queue (BullMQ)...
admin.broadcast_success: Broadcast jobs created for {count} users. A final report will arrive once sending completes.
